description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a widescreen display, featuring a black, matte-finished bezel that frames the screen. The front view shows a clear, illuminated display with a Windows desktop interface, suggesting it is powered on and functional. The monitor is supported by a broad, rectangular pedestal stand that provides stability and has a solid, angular design. The side views reveal the monitor's slim profile and the stand's substantial base, which appears to be made of sturdy plastic or metal. The rear view is plain, with no visible ports, buttons, or branding, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The overall construction suggests a modern, utilitarian design suitable for office or public urban environments.
description: A modern, widescreen computer monitor with a slim black bezel and a sturdy rectangular pedestal stand, featuring a powered-on display. The design is minimalist and functional, with a matte finish and no visible branding or ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the illuminated display with a Windows desktop, framed by a thin black bezel and supported by a wide rectangular stand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the depth of the rectangular pedestal stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel with no visible ports, buttons, or logos, and the full width of the stand.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, emphasizing the thinness of the monitor and the solid, angular base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and matte black, with sharp corners and no visible decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular pedestal stand with a wide, flat base, constructed from solid material, likely plastic or metal, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
